explanation: Reordering: The command reorders the arguments to avoid the specific string 'Set-Acl ' followed by '-AclObject ' and '-Path ' in sequence, which may prevent the Sigma rule from matching.
Insertion: Adding parentheses and using Get-Acl inline changes the structure of the command line, which may avoid the string-based detection of the Sigma rule.
Substitution: Replacing explicit commandlet strings with method calls and inline objects may avoid the specific command-line string matching used by the Sigma rule.
